author: claude
text:
dep tree: dotted sibling annotation on non-root rows

Add a computed `hier_path` (".1", ".1.2", …) to each tree `Node`
and `JsonNode`. Renders next to the id (spaced off, never fused)
so readers see the parent chain without cross-referencing `parent`.
Ids themselves stay flat `bl-<hex>` — no validator change, no
merge surface, no forward-compat break.

Chosen over the original plan of hierarchical ids (bl-X.1.1 as the
task id) because the stated goal was purely readability; adding id
duality would have forced an auto-renumber protocol on concurrent
mint and a pre-release validator loosener before the new form could
ship safely. Display-only achieves the same readability at a
fraction of the surface area.
